species.citation: L. , Sp. Pl., 1st Ed. (1753) 428 ; Merr., Fl. Manila (1912) 266; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 324.
species.notes: Area of origin unknown (Veldkamp 1971), but possibly native to the Moluccas (Blench 2008). Scarcely naturalized in secondary forest.

species.citation: L. , Sp. Pl., 1st Ed. (1753) 428 ; Merr., Fl. Manila (1912) 266; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 324. = Sarcotheca philippica (Fern.-Vill.) Hallier f. , Meded. Rijks-Herb. 2 (1911) 2.
species.notes: Area of origin unknown, but possibly native to Java (Veldkamp 1971) or Sri Lanka and the Moluccas (Morton 1987, Dasgupta et al. 2013).

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 3 October 2025

species.citation: Blume , Bijdr. fl. Ned. Ind. (1825) 242. var. fruticosum. Distribution: Cambodia, China, India, Lesser Sunda Isls, Malay Peninsula, Myanmar, New Guinea, Philippines, Sulawesi, Thailand, Vietnam. BOHOL, SULU ARCHIPELAGO. Notes: 0-800m. Native.
species.distribution: BOHOL, BONGAO, CEBU (photos), MINDORO, SULU ARCHIPELAGO.
Lesser Sunda Isls, Philippines, Sulawesi. MINDORO.

species.citation: (L.) DC. , Prodr. (A. P. de Candolle) 1 (1824) 690 ; Merr., Fl. Manila (1912) 266; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 324; ≡ Oxalis sensitiva L. , Sp. Pl., 1st Ed. (1753) 434.
species.distribution: Borneo, China, India, Indochina, Java, Laos, Lesser Sunda Isls, Malay Peninsula, Moluccas, Myanmar, Nepal, Philippines, Sri Lanka, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Taiwan, Thailand, Vietnam. JOLO, LEYTE, LUZON: Bataan, Batangas, Bulacan, Cagayan (photos), Cavite, Kalinga, Laguna, Mountain Province, NCR, Pampanga (photos), Rizal, MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte (photos), Davao, Davao del Sur, Zamboanga, Zamboanga del Norte (photos), MINDORO, NEGROS, PANAY, SAMAR.

species.citation: Welw. , Apont. (1859) 590; ≡ Biophytum petersianum Klotzsch , Naturw. Reise Mossambique 1 (1862) 81 ; Veldk., Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1971) 161. = Biophytum apodiscias (Turcz.) Edgew. & Hook.f. , Fl. Brit. India 1 (1874) 437 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 323; ≡ Oxalis apodiscias Turcz. , Bull. Soc. Imp. Naturalistes Moscou 36 (1863) 430.
species.distribution: Africa, Australia, China, India, Java, Lesser Sunda Isls, Madagascar, Moluccas, Myanmar, New Guinea, Philippines, Sri Lanka, Sulawesi, Thailand, Vietnam. LUZON: Abra (photos), Benguet, Mountain Province, MINDANAO: Bukidnon, Davao del Sur, MINDORO, NEGROS, PANAY.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 9 March 2025

species.citation: L. , Sp. Pl., 1st Ed. (1753) 435 ; Veldk., Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1971) 155. = Oxalis repens Thunb. , Oxalis (Thunberg) (1781) 16 ; Merr., Fl. Manila (1912) 265; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 323.
species.distribution: BALUT, BATANES, LEYTE, LUZON: Abra (photos), Benguet, Cavite (photos), Ifugao, Ilocos Norte, Ilocos Sur, Mountain Province, NCR, Pampanga, Rizal, MINDANAO: Davao del Sur, Misamis Oriental (photos), MINDORO, SABTANG, SIASI, SIQUIJOR (photos).
species.notes: Cryptogenic, but possibly native to SE Asia (Groom et al. 2019). 0-2200(-3000)m.

species.citation: Kunth , Nov. Gen. Sp. (H.B.K.), quarto Ed. 5 (1822) 236 ; Nesom, Phytologia 91 (2009) 516; Type: from Venezuela. = Oxalis corymbosa DC. , Prodr. (A. P. de Candolle) 1 (1824) 696 ; Veldk., Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1971) 159; Type: from La Réunion. = Oxalis martiana Zucc. , Denkschr. Königl. Akad. Wiss. München 9 (1825) 144 ; Merr., Fl. Manila (1912) 265; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 323; Type: from Brazil.
species.distribution: Neotropics. LUZON: Cavite (photos), Mountain Province, NEGROS.

species.citation: Edgew. & Hook.f. , Fl. Brit. India 1 (1874) 436; ≡ Oxalis acetosella ssp. griffithii (Edgew. & Hook.f.) Hara , J. Jap. Bot. 30 (1955) 22 ; Veldk., Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1971) 157. ssp. formosana (Terao) S.Aoki & J.Murata, Acta Phytotax. Geobot. 70 (2019) 165; ≡ Oxalis acetosella ssp. formosana Terao, Acta Phytotax. Geobot. 30 (1979) 61; Type: from Taiwan. Distribution: Philippines, Taiwan. LUZON: Benguet. Notes: Known from Mt Pulog. 2500-2900m. Native.
species.distribution: China, India, Myanmar, Nepal, Pakistan, Philippines, Taiwan, Tibet, Vietnam. LUZON: Benguet, MINDORO.
